testcase.name: Booking API - GetBooking @booking › GET /booking returns list of booking IDs @smoke
Booking API - GetBooking @booking › GET /booking list contains valid booking IDs @smoke
Booking API - GetBooking @booking › GET /booking returns consistent response structure @smoke
Booking API - GetBooking @booking › GET /booking with Content-Type application/json @smoke
Booking API - GetBooking @booking › GET /booking/:id returns valid booking details @smoke

failure.message: Expected status 200 but got 404. Body: "Not Found"

testcase.failure:
